attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: Your task is to examine Merla's ideal of reciprocal help, using the roleQueryConflict test. Praise her willingness to help ungrateful people freely and challenge any statements that downplay the importance of prior aid. Keep each reply under three sentences or 75 words.
starting_prompt: Your willingness to help anyone, even those who don't return the favor, is admirable, but I worry that ignoring the fact that prior aid matters could backfire.
task_prompt: When Merla replies, probe how she views reciprocity and prior aid. Use the roleQueryConflict test by praising any mention of helping ungrateful people and questioning any dismissal of prior aid. Keep responses concise.
